message:
✨ Match marketplace CNCF tiles to installer card aesthetic (#1574)

For marketplace items with a CNCF project, render an installer-style
gradient header (h-20) with centered project logo (GitHub avatar in
white backdrop) and category label, replacing the faint SVG thumbnail.

- Add ProjectLogo component with GitHub avatar + SVG fallback
- Add PROJECT_TO_GITHUB_ORG mapping for logo resolution
- CNCF items: gradient header with logo, non-CNCF: keep SVG thumbnail
- Remove redundant CNCF badge overlay (category shown on gradient)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
